name: Brenda & Steve Catalano
role: Daughter's Wedding · Sept 5, 2026 · 80-90 guests · Backyard, North Central MA

handling.tone: Mom + dad team (Brenda + husband Steve) co-planning daughter's backyard wedding. Cleanest demographic fit Comeketo gets. Don't fumble — they're already half-in.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: warm, peer, references daughter as the emotional anchor. Italian-American family in Fitchburg/Leominster/Worcester corridor.
handling.context: Inbound call Apr 19 — 16-min discovery went very well. Brazilian BBQ + churrasco aligned with their vision. Allergen-friendly options confirmed (45-day pre-event coordination). Tasting invited May 3 5:30 PM but tasting fee not yet received — Andre's Apr 22 SMS chases it.

context_anchors: Allergy/dietary 45-day coordination already discussed (GF + dairy-free flagged)
Tasting May 3 invited but fee not yet received

lead.next_move: Lock May 3 tasting RSVP — both Brenda + Steve ideally

enrichment.identity_notes: Comcast email + 978 area code + Catalano surname = North-Central MA family-planner profile. Italian-American, common in Fitchburg/Leominster/Worcester corridor. 16-min discovery confirmed Brenda + Steve co-planning. Cleanest demographic fit Comeketo gets — parents 40s-60s, daughter's backyard wedding, want memorable Brazilian BBQ.
win_angles: Emotional anchor on daughter — primary driver
Brazilian BBQ as differentiator — they didn't book generic
Co-planner dynamic: get Steve on call too
45-day pre-event coordination as feature: 'be a guest at your daughter's wedding, not the project manager'
nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Hey Brenda, just circling back on May 3rd tasting at 5:30 — are you and Steve both able to come, or planning around just one of you for now?'
Frame: 'When you imagine the night going perfectly for your daughter, what does that look like?'
Anchor: 'Tasting is the cheapest way to know if we're the right fit — $35/head, $70 of which comes back as a credit if you book.'
open_gaps: Bar package — open vs cash vs mocktail-heavy
enrichment.strategic_note: 'Don't fumble it' lead, not 'convince them' lead. Brenda came in warm. Make sure May 3 is locked, both there, tasting is dialed enough they leave wanting to book. Tasting attendance jumps probability 50% → 75%+. The whole game is making sure they show up.

comms.summary: Inbound call — Brenda inquiring about catering
16-min discovery — full event details, allergies, churrasco vision
Asked about gluten-free / dairy-free at tasting
Chasing tasting fee receipt to reserve table

notes: GF + dairy-free flagged for tasting prep
Tasting fee not received — chase before May 3
Get Steve on call for joint buy-in
